name: codex-fable5
description: Fable-style Codex workflow with source-section coverage, goal gates, verification grounding, VFF routing, and optional provider bridge guidance.

interface.longDescription: Codex Fable5 packages a Codex-native skill that adapts Claude Fable 5, fablize, and Value-for-Fable ideas into a tool-first workflow with source-section coverage accounting, evidence checkpoints, verification grounding, clue-first diagnosis, cost-aware routing, optional 2-pass review, and LiteLLM provider bridge guidance for users who already have authorized Anthropic model access.
defaultPrompt: Run this with Fable-style verification gates.
Set up a VFF-style Codex workflow.
